title: Art of Forging: A Tetra Addon
description: An addon mod for Tetra adding in new modules and items.
body:
![Embers of Eden update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b51fa08a52f022720af1894a503f19960f0290bf.png)

**__NOTE__: This requires the latest version of Tetra (and by extension mutil) to work! (4.8.0). Anything lower and the mod will not load.**

**__NOTE__: THIS MOD IS INCOMPATIBLE WITH TETRA VERSIONS HIGHER THAN 6.4.0**


Huge thanks to Noobulus, Legomastar, Nexus, Panda, and Smartin-B for helping to create and bug fix and inspire features in the mod!


This mod adds in 17 new modules to Tetra that you can craft. Many of them are inspired by real life weapons and pop-culture weapons. This mod also alters the loot tables for the simple dungeon chests. Each scroll should now have its own weight and rarity to make certain schematics more difficult to obtain.


Two of the added scrolls are available to craft. To find the recipes, browse through JEI and click on the scroll item when looking up @Tetra.

 

Art of Forging also has support for the following mods:

- Alex's Mobs
- From The Shadows
- Better Combat (Tetratic Combat needed)
 

Information for each of the added modules:

 

**__Sword Modules:__**

- Rapier blade

- Bastard blade

- Executioner blade

- Saber blade

- Flamberge blade<sup>1</sup>

- Katana<sup>1</sup>

- Key guard<sup>2</sup>

- Shifting blade<sup>3</sup>

- Void Worm Cleaver<sup>4</sup>

- Rending Scissors (Red and Purple)<sup>1</sup>

- Crucible blade<sup>1</sup>

- Murasama blade<sup>5</sup>

 

<sup>1</sup>*Only available through crafting the respective scrolls*

<sup>2</sup>*Only available through obtaining the scroll in dungeon loot*

<sup>3</sup>*Requires an amethyst block to be present in the players inventory*

<sup>4</sup>*Requires a void worm mandible to be present in the players inventory*

<sup>5</sup>*Is an improvement to the katana, unlocked through a craftable scroll*

 

**__Single Modules:__**

- Halberd head<sup>1</sup>

- Mace head<sup>1</sup>

 

<sup>1</sup>*Only available through obtaining the scroll in dungeon loot*

 

**__Double Modules:__**

- Tomahawk

- Void Worm Pickaxe<sup>1</sup>

 

<sup>1</sup>*Requires a void worm mandible to be present in the players inventory*

 

**__Bow Stave:__**

- Dreadnought stave<sup>1</sup>

<sup>1</sup>*Only available through obtaining the scroll in dungeon loot*

 

**__Shield Module:__**

- Kite Shield

 

**__FQA:__**

 

1. Will you backport to 1.16.x?

Nope. It is too much work for me, as I am not familiar with Forge for 1.16, and that there are a good amount of features that would not translate well if backported. If you want to backport it yourself feel free to though, this project is under MIT license as well as it has a Github repo you can pull from.

 

If you having any difficulties, questions, or just want to say hi please feel free to comment on this page! I will try my best to respond to all comments as soon as I am able to :)

 

I also have a Discord server now! Join here to chat, ask questions, or even suggest a feature!
